tossups.question: His farewell address warned against the dangers of political parties. For 10 points, name this first president of the United States.
One way to search over these data structurs is with the Knuth-Morris-Pratt algorithm. For 10 points, name these data structures that represent text.

bonuses.leadin: Answer some questions about Spain, for 10 points each.
parts: Name this is the capital of Spain.
Name this second most populous city in Spain. Catalan is spoken there.
Another language spoken in Spain is this one that comes from the Northwestern part of the country. It is heavily influenced by Portuguese.

bonuses.leadin: This character's biggest fear of rats is exploited in Room 101. For 10 points each:
parts: Winston Smith is a character in this novel.
This event happens each day in the novel, where they shout insults to Emmanuel Goldstein.
